description_long: This object is a medal-style pendant featuring a rectangular, deep blue ribbon with two vertical red stripes, attached to a circular metallic medallion. The medallion is adorned with a ring of stars around its perimeter and a central raised circle, giving it a distinguished, ceremonial appearance. The ribbon is connected to the medallion by a small metallic loop and ring, which appear sturdy and functional. The metallic parts have a polished, slightly reflective finish, suggesting they are made of brass or bronze. The ribbon is fabric-like, with a matte texture and rich color saturation. The overall design is formal and symbolic, reminiscent of military or honorific awards.
description: A ceremonial medal pendant with a blue and red striped ribbon and a star-decorated circular metallic medallion, connected by a polished metal ring.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the blue and red ribbon and the star-decorated medallion.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the ribbon and medallion, with the connecting ring visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the back of the ribbon and medallion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the metallic connector.
